page_name: Yoga Course Details — Online 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training — RYT 300
notes: Page is a single long landing for a specific course. Top-level Figma children are not strictly ordered — many sections live inside a 'Frame 1171281936' group (FAQ, instructors, more-courses, footer). Sections below are ordered by their absolute y coordinate.

sections.purpose: Two-column hero: left image (608x509) + right content (breadcrumb, H1 title, subtitle, meta-chips for mode/time/days, availability strip, primary CTA).

props.title: Online 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training — RYT 300
props.subtitle: Master the art of yoga in the air. Build strength, grace, and confidence while learning to teach this unique discipline.

components.notes: Image is full-bleed left half; right column is text + chips + CTA.
Small rounded pill with leading icon. Used 3x in hero.

sections.responsive_notes: Stack to single column on mobile; image moves above text.

sections.label: Section Tab Scroller / In-page Nav
sections.purpose: Sticky tab bar with anchor links: Overview, Highlights, Curriculum, Eligibility, Overall. Position appears to overlay hero / stick to top once scrolled past hero.

components.notes: Likely sticky on scroll; first tab shows pill/active state. 'Circulum' is a typo in Figma — keep label as-is for now, code prop should be 'Curriculum'.

sections.label: Overview
sections.purpose: Eyebrow + H2 + multi-paragraph body describing the course.

props.title: Deepen Your Practice, Advance Your Teaching

components.notes: Eyebrow + title pattern repeats across nearly every section — make this reusable.

paragraphs: The online 300-hour YTT improves a trainer's comprehension of core yoga principles and teachings covered in the RYT200 TTC worldwide yoga certification programme. Our yoga teacher training module equips students with more sophisticated yoga techniques in line with current trends, allowing them to instruct their students with confidence in the future.
After completing this advanced course, you will be certified as a RYT300 international yoga trainer and will be able to launch a successful career.

This 300 Hour TTC offered by Bodhi School of Yoga is accredited and recognised by Yoga Alliance. On a journey of self-discovery and profound transformation, our 300-Hour Yoga Teacher Training Course is carefully curated — designed to elevate both your personal practice and teaching skills.

items.title: Strong → Yoga Meets Flight
items.description: Combine traditional poses with graceful aerial movements.

items.title: Strong → Relieve & Realign
items.description: Inversions decompress the spine and boost flexibility.

items.title: Strong → Therapeutic & Fun
items.description: Enjoy emotional release through playful, healing practice.

items.title: Build Strength
items.description: Improve core stability, balance, and control.

items.title: Teach with an Edge
items.description: Gain a unique certification and grow your yoga career with a skill few teachers have.

items.title: Join a Community
items.description: Connect with passionate practitioners and expert teachers at Bodhi School of Yoga.

items: RYT200 TTC completion from Bodhi or any other institute
Enthusiastic housewives, fitness trainers, dance instructors, etc.
Anybody passionate to become a professional yoga instructor
Anybody who wants to be self-employed

components.notes: Each row: 22x22 check badge + label, sits inside a card with border.

sections.label: Certification — RYT300 (dark band)
sections.purpose: Eyebrow + H2 + dark/contrast band containing 'Globally Recognised' H3 and a paragraph about Yoga Alliance certification.

props.title: Certification of 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training :

props.heading: Globally Recognised
props.body: Becoming a Yoga Trainer entails dedicating oneself to the Yoga practise. It's all about putting Yoga's philosophy and expertise into practise on a daily basis. The goal is to become a powerful individual who, by their presence, emanates the Yoga philosophy. It is a road of bravery, devotion, and physical and mental self-discipline. The goal of the Level 3 Yoga Teacher Training Certification Course is to instil in pupils the spirit of a Yogi. This programme is suitable for active yoga practitioners, and upon completion, participants will get an international yoga teacher certification for RYT300

components.notes: Dark green band (matches Bodhi brand) housing white text.

sections.label: Testimonials — What People Are Saying?
sections.purpose: Eyebrow + H2 + 2x3 grid of testimonial cards (avatar + name + age/city + quote). Visible: 5 entries (1 hero card 440x318 + 4 smaller cards 440x158).

components.notes: Eyebrow 'Your Guide' looks misapplied in Figma (also reused for Meet Your Instructors). Recommend overriding to 'Testimonials' or leaving as-is per the design.

items.name: Anjilina Kalita
items.quote: If I could tell my past self that I'd someday quit packaged food, she'd laugh—chips were my weakness! I can now distinguish what's good for my body and treat it like a temple, not a trash can.

items.name: Sharada Sampathkumar
items.quote: If you're unsure, just attend—it could change your life! "You live only once, so if you want to enjoy your life in the true sense, just go enroll yourself into this workshop". It could add ten years to your life!

sections.label: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.purpose: Eyebrow + H2 + vertical accordion list. First item is expanded by default showing the answer.

items.question: Do I need prior experience in aerial yoga?
items.answer: No prior aerial yoga experience is required. A basic understanding of yoga postures and physical fitness to perform inversions is sufficient to join this course.

items.question: Is this TTC Yoga Alliance certified?
Will I get to practice on hammocks during training?
Can this course help me start my own aerial yoga classes?

components.notes: Use shadcn-style accordion if present. '+' / '−' indicator. Only 1 answer visible in Figma — remaining answers TBD by content team.

props.headline: Begin where you are.
props.body: Whether you want to teach, heal a specific thing, or simply move and breathe with people once a week — there's a door at Bodhi for that.

components.notes: Bodhi already has a closing-cta-section component used across pages. Per project rules, do not redesign it — reuse with content props.

uncertain.reason: Scroller frame is positioned at y=0 with width 1924 — could be a sticky in-page tab that overlays the hero, or a fixed nav. Figma places it before hero in z-order. Assumed sticky tabs.

Stray 'Frame 1171281785' at y=4466 contains a single testimonial-shaped card with Anjilina Kalita content — likely an orphaned/duplicate Figma layer outside the testimonials group. Excluded from sections.
Tab label 'Circulum' is a typo for 'Curriculum'. Treat as a Figma error; use 'Curriculum' in code prop.
Pre-Requisites list has 6 entries in Figma but only 3 unique strings (each duplicated). Likely placeholder fill — deduplicate when building or fetch real content.
Testimonial 'Your Guide' eyebrow is identical to the Instructors section eyebrow — looks like a copy-paste mistake. Recommend reviewing with design.
Loose rounded-rectangle at y=4008 and arrow group at y=4179 sit outside any named section frame — likely the Curriculum carousel arrow / card-peek artifact for a different state. Excluded.
